channel.title: +Articles on वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Recitational permutations
item.description: TODO: footnote and other formatting RECITATIONAL PERMUTATIONS OF THE ŚAUNAKĪYA ATHARVAVEDA Critically edited with an Introduction by Madhav M. Deshpande 2001 Dedicated with Respect and Affection to my Veda-Vidyā-Guru Late Professor R.N. Dandekar Preface While I was working on my edition of the Śaunakīyā Caturādhyāyikā, later published in 1997 as HOS, vol. 52, I felt the accute need to consult Atharvavedic reciters on the formation of Kramapāṭha, which is elaborately described in the rules of the Śaunakīyā Caturādhyāyikā.
